paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **causally masked multimodal modeling**, combining causal language modeling with masked span infilling for bidirectional context control in generative tasks across text and images.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl News (CC-NEWS) and English Wikipedia (processed HTML with images tokenized via VQVAE-GAN)
raw_extraction.application: Unconditional/image-conditioned image generation, zero-shot summarization, entity linking/disambiguation, text-image captioning, and cross-modal infilling (e.g., filling missing image/text segments).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (released code/models available but licensing details unspecified)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, zero-shot multimodal generative modeling across text, images, and structured hypertext within full document contexts.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal masked language modeling (next-token prediction + masked span infilling)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses **size hints** (via probabilistic token conditioning) for guiding mask span lengths during generation, though empirically found to degrade performance in this setup.
raw_extraction.paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **causally masked multimodal modeling**, combining causal language modeling with masked span infilling for bidirectional context control in generative tasks across text and images.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl News (CC-NEWS) and English Wikipedia (processed HTML with images tokenized via VQVAE-GAN)
raw_extraction.application: Unconditional/image-conditioned image generation, zero-shot summarization, entity linking/disambiguation, text-image captioning, and cross-modal infilling (e.g., filling missing image/text segments).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, zero-shot multimodal generative modeling across text, images, and structured hypertext within full document contexts.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal masked language modeling (next-token prediction + masked span infilling)
raw_extraction.paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: **Causally masked objective** enables hybrid causal/bidirectional generative modeling, allowing full document reconstruction (text + images) with masked span infilling conditioned on surrounding context. Achieves zero-shot SOTA in summarization, entity linking, and image generation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl News (CC-NEWS) and English Wikipedia (processed HTML with images tokenized via VQVAE-GAN)
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot/unconditional image generation, conditional image infilling, text-image captioning, entity linking/disambiguation, and cross-modal document reconstruction.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, zero-shot multimodal generative modeling across text, images, and structured hypertext within full document contexts.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal masked language modeling (next-token prediction + masked span infilling)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for entity linking/disambiguation (setting new state-of-the-art)
raw_extraction.paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: **Causally masked objective** enables hybrid causal/bidirectional generative modeling, allowing full document reconstruction (text + images) with masked span infilling conditioned on surrounding context. Demonstrates competitive zero-shot performance in image generation (FID scores approaching modern GANs) and captioning without explicit optimization.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Common Crawl News (CC-NEWS) and English Wikipedia (processed HTML with images tokenized via VQVAE-GAN)
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot/unconditional image generation, conditional image infilling, text-image captioning, entity linking/disambiguation, and cross-modal document reconstruction.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, zero-shot multimodal generative modeling across text, images, and structured hypertext within full document contexts.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal masked language modeling (next-token prediction + masked span infilling)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for entity linking/disambiguation (setting new state-of-the-art)
raw_extraction.paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **causal masked multimodal** approach combining text and image modalities using a unified transformer architecture, enabling joint pretraining on internet-scale data.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Internet-scale text and image data (including web text, Wikipedia, and VQ-VAE-GAN tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal downstream tasks (e.g., visual question answering, image captioning, text-to-image generation, and natural language understanding)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable multimodal pretraining for unified text-image representation learning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multitask supervised fine-tuning (e.g., GLUE benchmark tasks)
raw_extraction.paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **causal masked multimodal** approach combining text and image modalities using a unified transformer architecture, enabling joint pretraining on internet-scale data.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Internet-scale text and image data (including web text, Wikipedia, and VQ-VAE-GAN tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Multimodal downstream tasks (e.g., visual question answering, image captioning, text-to-image generation, and natural language understanding)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable multimodal pretraining for unified text-image representation learning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multitask supervised fine-tuning (e.g., GLUE benchmark tasks)
